subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the presence of the All-Merciful, the Compassionate, unto them that have believed in God, the Single, the One, the Mighty, the All-Powerful. Say: O people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی الرحمن الرحیم لمن آمن بالله الفرد الواحد العزیز القدیر قل یا قوم
subcodes.subjects: @high station of teachers of the Cause, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @martyrs and martyrdom, @love of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
